name: ux-ui-design
description: HTML/CSS/JS mockup-first UI/UX design. Generate multi-option screen mockups, multi-page user flows, and design-system palettes as throwaway single-file mockups in .mockups/ for alignment before implementation. Loosely integrates with agile-workflow.

interface.longDescription: Six skills for design-phase UI/UX work: ux-ui-principles (auto-loading reference + CLAUDE.md installer), palette (color + typography design system), components (reusable component library + showcase), screens (4-option single-screen mockups), flows (multi-page user journeys — sequential, hub-and-spoke, or hybrid), adopt (existing-project bootstrap that scans, audits, and orchestrates the pipeline in mirror or reimagine mode). All outputs are standalone single-file HTML mockups in .mockups/ — throwaway artifacts that align design decisions before implementation, loosely integrated with agile-workflow item ids.
